PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator (Petitioner). Avid Alavi for Gene Marchi (Petitioner). Pearl Yee and Henry Yee (apartment owners) also present.

Mr. Ferdon stated that they have been holding this Estate since July, that they had some false starts, that the Landlords want there property back, that the property has been sealed, and that he understands the Family is now united and that they have priority. Ms. Yee stated that she wants all of the Decedent's belongings removed from the premises. The Court granted Mr. Marchi's Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Jones. (Not Reported)
